overall.description: A third-person game sequence showing a character in winter clothing exploring a misty, snow-covered canyon. The character walks through shallow ice water, passes a large troll-like creature, and continues into an open snowy valley with ancient ruins visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: icy canyon stream with steep rock walls

events.description: character steps from icy water onto snow-covered bank

agents.ego_description: walking carefully through the shallow icy water of the canyon stream toward a large creature

notable_agents.action: large troll-like creature standing motionless in the frozen stream

entered.detail: steep dark rock wall covered in snow and ice
steep rocky cliff face with snow patches
shallow icy water with visible rocks beneath the surface
large leafless tree with gnarled branches arching over the canyon

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow icy canyon stream, flanked by steep rock walls. A large troll-like creature stands motionless in the water ahead as the character approaches and passes it, stepping onto the snow-covered bank.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered canyon path between high rock walls

events.description: emerging from shadowed canyon section into brighter area near the exit

agents.ego_description: continuing through the canyon on snow-covered ground, moving away from the creature toward the open valley

entered.detail: thick snow covering the canyon floor with patches of grass

segments.scene_description: Having left the icy stream, the character walks on snow-covered ground through the narrowing canyon. The rock walls recede into the distance as the character approaches a bright opening ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty snowy valley with scattered trees and rock formations

events.description: exits narrow canyon into wide open snowy valley with scattered trees

agents.ego_description: walking through the open valley, navigating around rocks and patches of grass

entered.detail: large dark boulders scattered across the snow field
distant stone structures barely visible through the mist
snow-covered mountain peaks forming the valley backdrop

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide misty valley as the canyon walls fall away. The character walks through deep snow scattered with rocks and bare trees, with ancient ruins and mountain ridges visible in the foggy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow field approaching ancient ruins

agents.ego_description: approaching the ancient ruins through the misty snow field, observing the surroundings

entered.detail: large dead tree lying on the snow-covered ground

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the open snow field as the mist thickens. Ancient ruins become more prominent ahead, and fallen logs litter the landscape as the valley stretches toward the distant mountains.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic confines of a narrow icy canyon into a vast, mist-shrouded mountain valley. It begins with the character wading through a shallow stream between steep rock walls, passing a motionless, troll-like creature before stepping onto the snowy bank. As the character advances, the canyon walls gradually recede and the path narrows, drawing the camera toward a bright opening of light. The scene then expands into a wide, foggy valley where the rock walls fall away to reveal deep snow, scattered boulders, and bare trees. Finally, the character pushes further into the open field as the mist thickens, moving past fallen logs toward prominent ancient ruins and distant mountain ridges.
